overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the player character approaching the Temple of Britomartis in ancient Greece. The scene features classical Greek architecture with stone columns, monumental lion statues flanking the entrance, and Mediterranean vegetation under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach path to ancient temple

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the temple entrance in the distance

entered.detail: large classical Greek temple with triangular pediment and stone columns
massive stone lion statue on pedestal flanking the left side of the path
massive stone lion statue on pedestal flanking the right side of the path
golden-brown dry grass and rocky soil covering the ground
large boulders and stones scattered along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of the Temple of Britomartis in the distance, approached via a dry, rocky dirt path. Two massive stone lion statues flank the entrance approach, growing larger as the camera moves forward through the sparse Mediterranean landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance pathway between guardian lion statues

events.description: camera passes between the two monumental stone lion statues flanking the entrance

agents.ego_description: passing between the stone lions and approaching the temple entrance with wooden barricades

entered.detail: large bronze brazier with flames positioned at the base of the right lion statue
large bronze brazier with flames positioned at the base of the left lion statue
sharpened wooden stakes and barriers blocking the direct entrance path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves between the two massive guardian lions, passing burning braziers at their bases. The temple entrance grows larger ahead, blocked by wooden barricades, while scaffolding becomes visible on the temple sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple portico entrance with restoration scaffolding

events.description: approaching the temple entrance under the stone portico with wooden scaffolding
camera tilts upward to reveal the detailed temple pediment and tall columns

agents.ego_description: approaching the temple doorway and looking up at the architectural details of the facade

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the temple entrance to the right side

entered.detail: wooden construction scaffolding covering the left side of the temple entrance
tall fluted stone columns supporting the temple portico
triangular stone pediment with carved relief sculptures at the top of the temple

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the temple portico, revealing detailed stone columns and the carved pediment above. Wooden scaffolding covers the sides of the entrance, and an armored guard stands to the right. The camera tilts up to admire the architecture before moving toward the dark entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: side path with temporary tents alongside temple wall

events.description: turning right to walk along the side of the temple instead of entering
discovery site triggered, revealing Messaran Banner collectible

agents.ego_description: turning right to explore the side of the temple grounds, passing canvas tents

entered.detail: temporary canvas and wood tents set up along the right side of the path
stone wall of the temple with weathered blocks and some ivy growth

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to bypass the main entrance, walking along a cobblestone side path lined with canvas tents. The temple wall rises on the left while temporary structures occupy the right. The segment ends with a discovery notification appearing as the player uncovers a historical site.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from a wide approach across a rocky landscape toward the detailed, barricaded entrance of the Temple of Britomartis. It begins on a dry dirt path, moving steadily toward the temple as two massive stone lion statues grow in scale to flank the camera. As the camera passes between these guardians and their burning braziers, the view shifts to reveal wooden barricades and scaffolding clinging to the temple's sides. The movement then carries the camera under the portico to admire the carved pediment and stone columns before tilting up and turning right to bypass the main entrance. Finally, the scene transitions onto a cobblestone side path lined with canvas tents and rising temple walls, ending as a discovery notification appears on screen.
